## Summary

> One-sentence description of what this PR does and why.

## Type

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Test additions/changes only
- [ ] `chore` — CI, deps, tooling
- [ ] `ci` — Workflow changes

## Context

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link related issues. -->

Closes #

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of concrete changes -->

-

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass: `uv run pytest tests/ -x -q`
- [ ] Typecheck clean: `uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing`
- [ ] Lint clean: `uv run ruff check src/ tests/`

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] No AI attribution in commits
- [ ] No secrets or credentials
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)
